3:08 AM. You said:

I placed an order a few days ago and still have no tracking — where is it?

03:08 AM

Hi, please log in so we can check your order status and tracking. If tracking has not appeared yet, it may be because the order has not been dispatched yet, or because tracked shipping was not selected at checkout. We can confirm which applies once you’re signed in.

3:09 AM. You said:

How long does it normally take to ship and send a tracking number?

03:09 AM

We usually aim to dispatch orders within 72 hours, but it can sometimes take up to 28 days. If tracked shipping was selected at checkout, the tracking number is normally sent in the shipment confirmation email once the order has been dispatched. If non-tracked shipping was selected, there will not be a tracking number.

03:09 AM

turns.q: Once it ships, how long is delivery?
turns.replyTail:
d at checkout, the tracking number is normally sent in the shipment confirmation email once the order has been dispatched. If non-tracked shipping was selected, there will not be a tracking number.

03:09 AM
3:09 AM. You said:

Once it ships, how long is delivery?

03:09 AM

Once dispatched, estimated delivery is 2 to 5 business days for the UK, 3 to 8 business days for Europe, and 10 to 15 business days for the rest of the world. These timeframes are approximate, so delays can happen.

03:09 AM
